word: G4885 - συναυξάνω - synauxánō - soon-owx-an'-o - Grow together

sections.paragraph:
- Original: συναυξάνω

- Transliteration: sunauxano

- Phonetic: soon-owx-an'-o

- Definition:

1. to cause to grow together

2. to grow together

- Origin: from G4862 and G837

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4862 and G837; to increase (grow up) together: - grow together.
